annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Velorian ModuleShield-584
gold_attachments.rationale: Named shield assembly — structural housing/cover for the busbar

gold_attachments.label: module section
gold_attachments.rationale: Subdivision of the battery module

gold_attachments.label: shield edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Edge of the shield — housing feature

gold_attachments.label: exposed busbar geometry
gold_attachments.rationale: The busbar layout visible for inspection — component

gold_attachments.label: busbar shield
gold_attachments.rationale: Insulating shield covering the busbar — structural housing

gold_attachments.label: retaining tab
gold_attachments.rationale: Tabs that retain the shield — fastening feature

gold_attachments.label: busbar edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Edges of the busbar conductors

gold_attachments.label: stud exit
gold_attachments.rationale: Points where studs pass through — component feature

gold_attachments.label: foam barrier
gold_attachments.rationale: Foam inserts acting as barriers — passive component

gold_attachments.label: cover rib
gold_attachments.rationale: Ribs on the cover — structural housing feature

gold_attachments.label: crack
gold_attachments.rationale: Physical damage — fault

gold_attachments.label: heat spot
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable thermal indication — signal

gold_attachments.label: missing tab
gold_attachments.rationale: Absence of retaining tabs — fault condition

gold_attachments.label: rub mark
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable contact marks — signal

gold_attachments.label: trimmed opening
gold_attachments.rationale: Openings modified by trimming — fault in shield

gold_attachments.label: loss of stand-off
gold_attachments.rationale: Gap between shield and busbar lost — fault condition (not a normal state)

gold_attachments.label: stud shoulder
gold_attachments.rationale: Shoulder of the stud — fastener feature

gold_attachments.label: neighboring shield
gold_attachments.rationale: Adjacent shield for reference — housing

gold_attachments.label: tab engagement
gold_attachments.rationale: Engagement state assessed by comparison — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: stand-off
gold_attachments.rationale: Gap measurement — observable signal/metric

gold_attachments.label: busbar coverage
gold_attachments.rationale: Extent of busbar being covered — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: contact witness
gold_attachments.rationale: Physical evidence of contact — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: cracked shield panel
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific fault: cracked panel (more specific than generic 'crack')

gold_attachments.label: missing retaining tab
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific fault: a retaining tab is absent (more specific than 'missing tab')

gold_attachments.label: mis-seated shield edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific fault: shield edge not properly seated

gold_attachments.label: cover-rib interference
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific fault: cover rib interfering with shield

gold_attachments.label: interfering support feature
gold_attachments.rationale: Support feature that interferes — fault condition

gold_attachments.label: final loading
gold_attachments.rationale: State after all parts refitted and loaded — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: final coverage result
gold_attachments.rationale: Outcome of coverage verification — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: release boundary
gold_attachments.rationale: Criteria for releasing the job — acceptance state
